defaults.fields: nextPageToken, files(id, name, mimeType, parents, size, modifiedTime, webViewLink, capabilities/canDownload, capabilities/canShare)

search_templates.use_when: User searches by visible filename fragment.
User lists direct children of a known folder.
User searches for one Drive or Workspace MIME type.

notes: Use q to filter files before listing broad result sets.
Use fields to avoid returning the whole File resource when only IDs and metadata are needed.
Use corpora=user for My Drive searches and corpora=drive with driveId for one Shared Drive before using allDrives.
